_meta.source: Phase 1 spec — 15 active equity + 35 inactive equity + 63 inactive options = 113 total
_meta.note: Inactive entries (is_active=false) ship with empty config_json={}; populating their configs is Phase 2-3 work. Options entries (requires_options_builder=true) wait on Phase 7-8 options builder. All names + slugs in the inactive set are placeholders pending Jayesh's catalog review — see BLOCKERS_TEMPLATES.md for the audit trail.

templates.name: EMA Crossover 9/21
templates.description_en: Classic short-term trend follower. Enter long when the 9-period EMA crosses above the 21-period EMA, exit on the reverse cross. Works best on liquid large-caps in trending sessions.
templates.description_hi: Chhote-term ka trend follower. 9 EMA jab 21 EMA ke upar cross kare, long lo; ulta cross hone par exit. Liquid large-caps mein trending session mein best chalti hai.

entry_long.condition: ema_9 crosses above ema_21

templates.name: EMA Crossover 20/50
templates.description_en: Slower trend follower for swing-day intraday. 20 EMA over 50 EMA = long bias; below = short. Tighter signals than 9/21, fewer whipsaws on choppy days.
templates.description_hi: Slow trend follower, swing-intraday ke liye. 20 EMA upar 50 EMA = long; neeche = short. 9/21 se kam signals, choppy din mein whipsaw kam.

entry_long.condition: ema_20 crosses above ema_50

templates.name: MACD Trend with Signal Cross
templates.description_en: MACD line crosses above signal line with positive histogram = long entry. Captures momentum shifts; exit on opposite cross. Pair with index trend filter for fewer false signals.
templates.description_hi: MACD line jab signal line ke upar cross kare aur histogram positive ho — long entry. Momentum shifts capture karta hai; opposite cross par exit. Index trend filter ke saath false signals kam.

entry_long.condition: macd_line crosses above signal_line AND macd_histogram > 0

entry_short.condition: macd_line crosses below signal_line AND macd_histogram < 0

templates.name: Supertrend Rider
templates.description_en: Ride the Supertrend until it flips. Long when supertrend turns green (close above line), exit + flip to short when it turns red. Single indicator, very low cognitive load.
templates.description_hi: Supertrend jab tak flip nahi hota, ride karte raho. Green (close upar) = long, red = short flip. Ek hi indicator, dimaag pe load kam.

entry_long.condition: supertrend flips to bullish (close > supertrend)

templates.name: RSI Oversold Bounce
templates.description_en: Buy when RSI(14) crosses above 30 from oversold territory. Exit on overbought (RSI > 70) or on a mean-reversion failure (RSI back below 50). Best on range-bound days.
templates.description_hi: RSI(14) jab 30 ke neeche se upar aaye — buy. Overbought (>70) par ya RSI 50 ke neeche aane par exit. Range-bound din mein best.

entry_long.condition: rsi_14 crosses above 30 from below

templates.name: Bollinger Band Mean Reversion
templates.description_en: Price touches lower BB → buy back to middle band. Lower-band tag combined with prior bar above the band filters out trending sell-offs. Pine-default biased stddev.
templates.description_hi: Lower BB ko touch kare to middle band tak buy. Pichle bar agar band ke upar tha to trending sell-off filter ho jaata hai. Pine-default biased stddev.

entry_long.condition: low <= bb_lower AND previous close > bb_lower

templates.name: BB Squeeze Breakout
templates.description_en: When Bollinger Band width contracts to a 20-bar low (the 'squeeze'), volatility is coiled. A break above the upper band = long; below lower = short. ATR-confirmed for false-breakout protection.
templates.description_hi: Jab Bollinger Band width 20-bar low pe ho (squeeze), volatility coiled hoti hai. Upper band ke upar break = long, neeche = short. ATR confirmation se fake breakout filter.

entry_long.condition: bb_width at 20-bar low AND close > bb_upper AND atr_14 increasing

entry_short.condition: bb_width at 20-bar low AND close < bb_lower AND atr_14 increasing

templates.name: Opening Range Breakout (15-min)
templates.description_en: First 15 minutes of trading (09:15-09:30 IST) define the opening range. Break above the high = long; below low = short. Tight intraday strategy, exit by 14:45 IST.
templates.description_hi: Pehle 15 minute (09:15-09:30 IST) ka high-low = opening range. High ke upar break = long, low ke neeche = short. Tight intraday — 14:45 ke pehle exit.

entry_long.condition: close > orb_15_high AND timestamp >= 09:30 IST

templates.name: Previous Day High/Low Breakout
templates.description_en: Close above previous day's high = long; close below previous day's low = short. Simple key-level breakout, well-suited for swing-day positions held into the close.
templates.description_hi: PDH (previous day high) ke upar close = long; PDL ke neeche close = short. Simple key-level breakout, swing-day ke liye perfect.

entry_long.condition: close > pdh

templates.name: VWAP Bounce
templates.description_en: Intraday VWAP acts as a fair-value reference. When price extends above VWAP and pulls back to touch it = long bounce setup; below VWAP with pullback up = short. Exit on +1% extension or VWAP break.
templates.description_hi: Intraday VWAP fair-value reference hai. Price VWAP ke upar gaya aur wapas touch kare to long bounce; neeche aur pullback up = short. +1% extension ya VWAP break par exit.

entry_long.condition: prior bars > vwap AND current low touches vwap AND close > vwap

templates.name: MACD Histogram Momentum
templates.description_en: Pure histogram play: enter long when histogram crosses zero from below AND is rising for 2 consecutive bars. Exit when histogram tops (current bar < previous bar). Captures momentum acceleration.
templates.description_hi: Sirf histogram play: histogram zero ke upar cross kare aur 2 bar lagatar badhe — long entry. Histogram peak hone par (current < previous) exit. Momentum acceleration capture karta hai.

entry_long.condition: macd_histogram crosses above 0 AND macd_histogram[0] > macd_histogram[1] > macd_histogram[2]

entry_short.condition: macd_histogram crosses below 0 AND macd_histogram[0] < macd_histogram[1] < macd_histogram[2]

templates.name: Bank Nifty Weekly Expiry (Equity Leg)
templates.description_en: Weekly Thursday expiry play on Bank Nifty CONSTITUENTS (equity leg, no options). Long bias when BANKNIFTY closes above PDH on Thursday morning AND India VIX < 16. Tight stop to manage expiry-day volatility.
templates.description_hi: Thursday weekly expiry par Bank Nifty constituents par equity-leg play (options nahi). BANKNIFTY morning PDH se upar AND VIX < 16 to long bias. Expiry-day volatility ke liye tight stop.

entry_long.condition: weekday == Thursday AND banknifty_close > banknifty_pdh AND india_vix < 16

templates.name: Pre-Market Gap Strategy
templates.description_en: Trade gaps in the 0.5-1.5% range that confirm with first-15-min direction. Gap-up + first 2 bars close >= open = long continuation; gap-down + mirror = short. Excludes wild gaps (>1.5%) where mean reversion dominates.
templates.description_hi: 0.5-1.5% gap, first-15-min ke direction ke saath confirm. Gap-up + pehle 2 bar close >= open = long continuation; gap-down + ulta = short. Bade gaps (>1.5%) exclude — woh mean-revert hote hain.

entry_long.condition: pre_market_gap_pct between 0.5 and 1.5 AND first 2 bars close >= open

entry_short.condition: pre_market_gap_pct between -1.5 and -0.5 AND first 2 bars close <= open

exit_long.condition: close < open of bar 3 OR timestamp >= 14:30 IST

exit_short.condition: close > open of bar 3 OR timestamp >= 14:30 IST

templates.name: RSI + MACD Confluence
templates.description_en: Two-confirm momentum entry — both RSI(14) > 50 AND MACD line above signal. Exit if either condition fails. Fewer trades than single-indicator versions, but each has thicker confluence.
templates.description_hi: Do-confirm momentum entry — RSI(14) > 50 AND MACD line signal ke upar dono honi chahiye. Koi bhi condition fail = exit. Single-indicator se trades kam, par har trade thicker confluence pe.

entry_long.condition: rsi_14 > 50 AND macd_line > signal_line

templates.name: BB + RSI Oversold
templates.description_en: Two-confirm mean reversion: price must touch lower Bollinger Band AND RSI(14) must be below 30. Exit at middle band or RSI > 50. Stronger filter than single-indicator BB-mean-rev, fewer false signals in trending markets.
templates.description_hi: Do-confirm mean reversion: price ne lower BB touch karna chahiye AND RSI(14) 30 ke neeche ho. Middle band tak ya RSI > 50 par exit. Single-indicator se zyada filter, trending market mein kam fake signals.

entry_long.condition: low <= bb_lower AND rsi_14 < 30

templates.name: Heikin-Ashi Trend Follower
templates.description_en: Heikin-Ashi candle smoothing for trend continuation entries. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: 3 consecutive green Heikin-Ashi candles AND close > ema_20 AND ema_20 sloping up

exit_long.condition: first red Heikin-Ashi candle OR close < ema_20

templates.name: Donchian Channel Breakout
templates.description_en: 20-period Donchian high/low breakout — Turtle-trader-style trend entry. Coming soon.

templates.name: Keltner Channel Bounce
templates.description_en: Mean-reversion off Keltner channel boundary touches with ATR confirmation. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: close < lower keltner band on previous bar AND current bar closes back above lower band AND ema_50 sloping up

templates.name: Parabolic SAR Reversal
templates.description_en: Reversal entries on SAR flip with trailing stop built-in. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: parabolic_sar flips from above price to below price AND price > ema_50

templates.name: Ichimoku Cloud Crossover
templates.description_en: Tenkan/Kijun crossover above the cloud — Japanese-style trend filter. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: close crosses above kumo (cloud) AND tenkan > kijun AND chikou above price-26-bars-ago

exit_long.condition: tenkan crosses below kijun OR close drops back into kumo

templates.name: ADX Strong Trend Filter
templates.description_en: ADX > 25 trend strength filter combined with directional MA. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: adx_14 > 25 AND ema_9 crosses above ema_21 AND ema_9 sloping up

exit_long.condition: ema_9 crosses below ema_21 OR adx_14 < 18

templates.name: Triple EMA Crossover
templates.description_en: 5/20/50 stacked EMAs with ribbon-style entry confirmation. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: ema_8 > ema_21 > ema_55 AND ema_8 crosses above ema_21 in the last 2 bars

exit_long.condition: ema_8 crosses below ema_21 OR close < ema_55

templates.name: Williams %R Reversal
templates.description_en: Williams %R extreme reversal at -80/-20 zones. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: williams_r_14 crosses above -80 from below AND close > ema_50

exit_long.condition: williams_r_14 crosses below -20 from above OR close < ema_50

templates.name: CCI Momentum
templates.description_en: Commodity Channel Index +100/-100 momentum entries. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: cci_20 crosses above +100 from below AND close > ema_50

exit_long.condition: cci_20 crosses back below +100 from above OR cci_20 > +200 (mean-reversion fade zone)

templates.name: Stochastic Oscillator
templates.description_en: Classic %K/%D crossover at oversold/overbought zones. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: %K crosses above %D AND both < 20 AND close > ema_50

templates.name: Aroon Crossover
templates.description_en: Aroon Up/Down crossover for trend initiation. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: aroon_up_14 crosses above aroon_down_14 AND aroon_up_14 > 70

exit_long.condition: aroon_down_14 crosses above aroon_up_14 OR aroon_up_14 < 50

templates.name: PSAR + EMA Combo
templates.description_en: Trend filter (EMA20) + tactical entry (PSAR flip). Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: parabolic_sar below price AND close > ema_50 AND ema_50 sloping up AND prior bar parabolic_sar was above price

templates.name: Pivot Point Bounce
templates.description_en: Standard pivot R1/R2/S1/S2 bounce trades. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: price touches S1 from above AND rsi_14 < 40 AND current bar prints bullish reversal pattern (hammer, bullish engulfing, or bottom-wick > 60% of bar range)

exit_long.condition: price reaches PP (daily pivot) OR price closes below S1 - 0.5%

templates.name: Camarilla Pivots Intraday
templates.description_en: Camarilla pivot H3/H4/L3/L4 breakout/reversal logic. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: price closes above H3 (Camarilla 3rd resistance) with volume > 1.5x recent average AND close > vwap

exit_long.condition: price reaches H4 OR price closes back below H3

templates.name: Fibonacci Retracement Entry
templates.description_en: Fib 38.2/50/61.8 retracement entries during trend pullback. Coming soon.

templates.name: Renko Trend
templates.description_en: Renko brick reversal for noise-filtered trend trading. Coming soon.

templates.name: Range Trading (Support/Resistance)
templates.description_en: Buy at support, sell at resistance — classic range play. Coming soon.

templates.name: Inside Bar Breakout
templates.description_en: Inside bar consolidation pattern + breakout direction trade. Coming soon.

templates.name: Engulfing Candle Reversal
templates.description_en: Bullish/bearish engulfing pattern reversal entries. Coming soon.

templates.name: Hammer / Hanging Man Pattern
templates.description_en: Classic hammer/hanging man wick rejection at support/resistance. Coming soon.

templates.name: Doji Reversal
templates.description_en: Doji indecision candle followed by directional confirmation bar. Coming soon.

templates.name: Heikin-Ashi Smooth Trend
templates.description_en: Heikin-Ashi colour + body-size trend continuation. Coming soon.

templates.name: Chandelier Exit Trail
templates.description_en: ATR-based chandelier trailing stop on a trend entry. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: close crosses above chandelier_long_stop AND close > ema_50 AND ema_50 sloping up

templates.name: Volume Spike + Price Confirm
templates.description_en: Above-average volume bar with directional price confirmation. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: volume > 2.0 * volume_sma_20 AND close > open AND close > ema_20 AND (high - close) < 0.4 * (high - low)

exit_long.condition: close < ema_20 OR close < entry_price - 1 ATR

templates.name: OBV Divergence
templates.description_en: On-Balance-Volume divergence vs price for reversal signals. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: price prints lower low in last 25 bars AND obv prints higher low (bullish divergence) AND close > ema_50 OR close within 1% of ema_50

exit_long.condition: obv prints lower high while price prints higher high (bearish divergence emerging) OR close < ema_50 - 1%

templates.name: CMF Confirmation
templates.description_en: Chaikin Money Flow filter for trend entries. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: ema_20 crosses above ema_50 AND cmf_20 > 0.05 (positive money flow)

exit_long.condition: ema_20 crosses below ema_50 OR cmf_20 < -0.05

templates.name: MFI Overbought/Oversold
templates.description_en: Money-Flow-Index 80/20 zones — volume-weighted RSI cousin. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: mfi_14 crosses above 20 from below AND close > ema_50

exit_long.condition: mfi_14 crosses below 80 from above OR close < ema_50

templates.name: RSI Divergence
templates.description_en: Bullish/bearish RSI divergence with price for early reversal. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: price prints lower low in last 20 bars AND rsi_14 prints higher low AND current candle bullish reversal pattern

templates.name: MACD Divergence
templates.description_en: MACD line/price divergence early reversal entries. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: price prints lower low in last 25 bars AND macd histogram prints higher low (bullish divergence) AND macd line above its signal

exit_long.condition: macd line crosses below signal line OR macd histogram contracts for 3 consecutive bars

templates.name: Bollinger %B Extreme
templates.description_en: %B < 0 or > 1 extreme reversal entries. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: bollinger_pct_b crosses above 0 from negative (price closes back inside lower band) AND rsi_14 < 35

exit_long.condition: bollinger_pct_b >= 0.5 (price reaches middle band) OR bollinger_pct_b > 1.0 (extreme upper)

templates.name: Squeeze Momentum
templates.description_en: LazyBear Squeeze Momentum compression + release direction. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: previous bar bollinger bands inside keltner channels (squeeze) AND current bar bollinger expands outside keltner AND momentum_12 > 0

exit_long.condition: momentum_12 crosses below 0 OR price closes below middle bollinger band

templates.name: Hull MA Trend
templates.description_en: Hull moving-average slope-based trend filter. Coming soon.

entry_long.condition: hull_ma_21 colour flips from red (sloping down) to green (sloping up) AND close > hull_ma_21

exit_long.condition: hull_ma_21 colour flips back to red

templates.name: ALMA Slope
templates.description_en: Arnaud Legoux MA slope direction entry/exit. Coming soon.

templates.name: KAMA Adaptive Trend
templates.description_en: Kaufman Adaptive MA — efficiency-ratio-weighted trend following. Coming soon.

templates.name: Pivot Reversal Strategy
templates.description_en: TradingView's classic Pivot Reversal swing strategy port. Coming soon.

templates.name: Bull Call Spread (Index)
templates.description_en: Long call at ATM + short call OTM — limited risk bullish play on NIFTY/BANKNIFTY weeklies. Requires options builder (Phase 7-8).

templates.name: Bear Put Spread (Index)
templates.description_en: Long put ATM + short put OTM — limited risk bearish play. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Iron Condor — NIFTY Weekly
templates.description_en: Four-leg neutral premium-collection strategy on NIFTY weekly expiry. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Iron Butterfly — NIFTY Weekly
templates.description_en: ATM short straddle + protective wings — narrower condor for higher premium. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Long Straddle (Event-Driven)
templates.description_en: Long ATM call + long ATM put — long-volatility play around earnings / policy events. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Short Straddle (Range-Bound)
templates.description_en: Short ATM call + short ATM put — premium collection in expected range-bound days. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Long Strangle
templates.description_en: Long OTM call + long OTM put — cheaper long-vol alternative to straddle. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Short Strangle
templates.description_en: Short OTM call + short OTM put — wider profit zone than short straddle. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Covered Call (Equity Holdings)
templates.description_en: Own underlying stock + sell ATM/OTM call — premium income on existing holdings. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Cash-Secured Put
templates.description_en: Sell OTM put with cash collateral — collect premium, accept assignment if exercised. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Calendar Call Spread
templates.description_en: Short near-month call + long far-month call (same strike). Requires options builder.

templates.name: Calendar Put Spread
templates.description_en: Short near-month put + long far-month put. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Diagonal Call Spread
templates.description_en: Calendar + vertical hybrid — different strikes + different expiries on calls. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Diagonal Put Spread
templates.description_en: Diagonal version on puts. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Ratio Call Spread 1x2
templates.description_en: Long 1 ATM call + short 2 OTM calls — moderate bullish with capped upside. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Ratio Put Spread 1x2
templates.description_en: Ratio-spread version on puts. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Call Backspread 1x3
templates.description_en: Short 1 ITM call + long 3 OTM calls — strong-bullish-or-big-move profile. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Put Backspread 1x3
templates.description_en: Backspread on puts — strong-bearish-or-big-move. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Synthetic Long
templates.description_en: Long ATM call + short ATM put = synthetic underlying long. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Synthetic Short
templates.description_en: Long ATM put + short ATM call = synthetic underlying short. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Box Spread (Arbitrage)
templates.description_en: Long bull-call + short bear-put on identical strikes — interest-rate / arbitrage construct. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Collar (Protective)
templates.description_en: Own stock + sell OTM call + buy OTM put — capped upside, protected downside. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Protective Put
templates.description_en: Long stock + long OTM put — downside insurance. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Protective Call
templates.description_en: Short stock + long OTM call — upside insurance for short position. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Strap (3 Long Calls + 1 Long Put)
templates.description_en: Bullish-biased long-vol straddle variant. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Strip (3 Long Puts + 1 Long Call)
templates.description_en: Bearish-biased long-vol straddle variant. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Christmas Tree Call
templates.description_en: 1-3-2 call spread structure. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Christmas Tree Put
templates.description_en: 1-3-2 put spread structure. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Jade Lizard
templates.description_en: Short OTM put + short call spread — no upside risk if structured right. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Big Lizard
templates.description_en: Jade lizard with ATM short strangle leg — higher premium, tighter range. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Bull Put Spread
templates.description_en: Short OTM put + long further-OTM put — premium-collection bullish. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Bear Call Spread
templates.description_en: Short OTM call + long further-OTM call — premium-collection bearish. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Iron Albatross
templates.description_en: Wider iron condor — lower premium, wider safe range. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Reverse Iron Condor
templates.description_en: Long the wings, short the body — long-vol expecting big move either way. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Reverse Iron Butterfly
templates.description_en: Long ATM straddle + short wings — narrower long-vol play. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Long Call (Directional Bullish)
templates.description_en: Single long ATM/OTM call — classic bullish play. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Long Put (Directional Bearish)
templates.description_en: Single long ATM/OTM put — classic bearish play. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Short Call (Advanced)
templates.description_en: Naked short call — unlimited upside risk. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Short Put (Premium Collection)
templates.description_en: Naked short put without cash collateral — premium income + assignment risk. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Naked Strangle
templates.description_en: Short OTM call + short OTM put, no protection — premium-collection range play with assignment risk. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Naked Straddle
templates.description_en: Short ATM call + short ATM put, no protection — maximum theta but maximum risk. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Calendar Iron Condor
templates.description_en: Iron condor across two expiries — captures theta + IV-skew. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Double Diagonal
templates.description_en: Diagonal call spread + diagonal put spread — complex theta/vega trade. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Theta Income Iron Condor
templates.description_en: Standard iron condor managed for theta decay — Indian-market-tuned strikes. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Delta-Neutral Iron Condor
templates.description_en: Iron condor re-balanced when delta drifts past threshold. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Gamma Scalping
templates.description_en: Long-gamma straddle + delta-hedge as underlying moves. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Volatility Surface Trade
templates.description_en: IV skew + term structure relative-value trade. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Skew Trade
templates.description_en: Risk-reversal positioning when put/call skew is mispriced. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Term Structure Trade
templates.description_en: Calendar play exploiting IV-term-structure inversion. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Pin Risk Avoidance
templates.description_en: Defensive close-out strategy when expiry pin risk emerges. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Expiry Day Pin Strategy
templates.description_en: Iron condor positioned around expected pin strike on expiry. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Expiry Day Theta Crush
templates.description_en: Short-vol straddle/strangle on expiry day capturing theta crush. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Weekly Expiry Iron Fly
templates.description_en: Iron butterfly on Tuesday for NIFTY weekly expiry. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Monthly Expiry Iron Condor
templates.description_en: Iron condor placed 30 DTE on monthly expiry — Indian-derivatives staple. Requires options builder.

templates.name: BANKNIFTY Weekly Iron Fly
templates.description_en: BANKNIFTY-specific iron fly tuned for higher IV. Requires options builder.

templates.name: NIFTY Weekly Iron Condor
templates.description_en: NIFTY weekly iron condor placed Wednesday for Thursday expiry. Requires options builder.

templates.name: NIFTY Monthly Calendar
templates.description_en: Calendar spread Buy-next-month / Sell-current-month for theta + IV-skew. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Index Options Volatility Crush
templates.description_en: Short-vol post-event when IV crushes back to mean. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Index Options Pre-Event
templates.description_en: Long-vol straddle leading into RBI / budget / earnings. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Single-Stock Options Income
templates.description_en: Iron condor on liquid single-name F&O stocks (RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, etc.). Requires options builder.

templates.name: Single-Stock Options Directional
templates.description_en: Long call / long put on liquid single-stock F&O. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Stock Options Earnings Play
templates.description_en: Long-vol straddle around single-stock earnings release. Requires options builder.

templates.name: Stock Options Dividend Capture
templates.description_en: Long stock + short call positioned around ex-dividend date. Requires options builder.
